module_header: module TopModule ( input clock, input a, output reg p, output reg q );
prompt:
I would like you to implement a module named TopModule with the following
interface. All input and output ports are one bit unless otherwise
specified.

 - input  clock
 - input  a
 - output p
 - output q

The module should implement a sequential circuit. Read the simulation
waveforms to determine what the circuit does, then implement it.

  time   clock   a   p   q
